---
title: EDA
execute:
 jupyter: math4025
---

 ```{python}
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from plotnine import *
from pyhere import here
from sklearn.base import BaseEstimator, TransformerMixin
import itertools
```

```{python}
## Contains response data
meta = pd.read_csv(here("data", "MIRION_meta_all_1.csv"), encoding='utf-8-sig')

meta=meta.set_index("YB")

## Contains flux data
spec_raw = pd.read_csv(here("data", "MIRION_spec_1.csv"), index_col=0, encoding='utf-8-sig')

spec = spec_raw.T.copy()
spec.index.name = "YB"
spec.columns = ["F8", "F12", "F24", "F70", "F160", "F250", "F350", "F500", "F870", "F1100"]
spec.index = pd.to_numeric(spec.index)

mirion = meta.join(spec, how="inner")
mirion.head()
```

```{python}
for top, bottom in itertools.permutations(["F8", "F12", "F24", "F70", "F160", "F250", "F350", "F500", "F870", "F1100"], 2):
    new_col_name = f"{top}_over_{bottom}"
    mirion[new_col_name] = mirion[top] / mirion[bottom]
mirion.head()
```

```{python}
print(mirion.columns.to_list())
```


```{python}
(
    ggplot(mirion, aes(x='F70_over_F160', y='TEMP')) +
    geom_point()
    + scale_x_continuous(limits=(0, 10))
    # + scale_x_log10()
)
```

```{python}
phot = pd.read_csv(here("data/cleaned", "MIRION_cleaned_all_fluxes.csv"))
phot['1overF70overF160'] = 1/ (phot['F70'] / phot['F160'])

(
    ggplot(phot, aes(x='1overF70overF160', y='TEMP')) +
    geom_point() +
    scale_x_continuous(limits=(0,50)) +
    # scale_y_log10() +
    scale_x_log10()
)
```
